title: Beyond Dividend: Nestle Nigeria Shareholders Journey Towards Sustaining Return On Investment - FinancialEDGE
description: In the face of Nigeria's turbulent business landscape, Nestle Nigeria Plc has navigated unprecedented challenges to emerge as a beacon of resilience. In this insightful feature, Odume Festus explores the company's strategy, illuminating how shareholders are reaping sustained returns on investment, even in the absence of dividends.
